phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la biglietteria per i tour, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah bee-lyet-teh-REE-ah per ee toor, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto per il tour, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah eel bee-lyet-toh per eel toor, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è necessario prenotare online per visitare, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, eh neh-ches-SA-ree-o pre-noh-TAH-reh on-LINE per vee-zee-TAH-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come posso acquistare i biglietti della partita, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh POS-soh ah-kwee-STAH-reh ee bee-lyet-tee DEL-la par-TEE-tah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Only online or at the ticket office.

responses.english: Only online or at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un guardaroba per le borse, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon goo-ar-da-ROH-bah per le BOR-seh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at the end on the right.

responses.english: Yes, at the end on the right.
